summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Digital ProScan workforce GPS tracking dashboard. All backend APIs and frontend pages tested successfully with full CRUD operations and integration testing.

design_issues.issue: Map view is placeholder only - requires mapping library integration (Mapbox/Google Maps)

passed_tests: Backend API health endpoints (/api/, /api/health)
Dashboard stats endpoint with correct data structure
Team Members CRUD (create, read, update, delete)
Jobs/Work Orders CRUD with archive/restore functionality
Geofences CRUD operations
Location tracking submission and retrieval
Status updates for all worker states (WORKING, SUPPORT_ACTIVITY, WORK_DELAY, TRAVELING, IDLE)
SOS alerts with acknowledge/cancel/resolve workflow
Job assignment to team members
Productivity and work barriers reporting
Reference data endpoints (support activities, work delay types)
Frontend Dashboard page with stats cards and recent activity
Team Members page with add member dialog and member cards
Team Member Detail page with profile editing and job assignment
Jobs/Work Orders page with create job dialog and tabs
Alerts page with active/history tabs and refresh functionality
Reports page with member filtering and productivity analytics
Geofences page with create geofence dialog and color selection
Live Map page with team member sidebar and geofence toggle
Navigation between all pages working correctly
All form submissions and API integrations working
Toast notifications for user feedback
Data persistence across page refreshes
